nits.issue: goal is legacy-only on the automation path (kicker re-reads automation.goal); interface comment could note that explicitly.
Warns + tolerates mismatch using automation.workspace_id. Defensive but relies on scheduler invoke-role isolation; consider hard reject if invoke role is ever shared more broadly.
Automation path uses workspace_id; legacy path uses ${ws}:${laneId}. Intentional but worth noting for FIFO ordering semantics.
Inputs forwarded as empty object to dispatcher; symmetric with D.3. Verify worker treats absent inputs and {} identically.
max:1 + idle_timeout:5 — cron-kicker doesn't LISTEN so port :6543 is correct; just a callout.
